testcase.name: test_02_register_new_user
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_kyc_verification.py:62: in test_02_register_new_user assert response.status_code == 200, f"Registration failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Registration failed: {"detail":"Maximal 2 Konten pro Haushalt erlaubt. Kontaktieren Sie den Support bei Fragen."} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_03_get_kyc_status_initial
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_kyc_verification.py:80: in test_03_get_kyc_status_initial assert response.status_code == 200, f"KYC status check failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: KYC status check failed: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_04_upload_id_front
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_kyc_verification.py:108: in test_04_upload_id_front assert response.status_code == 200, f"ID front upload failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: ID front upload failed: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_kyc_verification.py:130: in test_05_upload_id_back assert response.status_code == 200, f"ID back upload failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: ID back upload failed: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_kyc_verification.py:151: in test_06_upload_selfie assert response.status_code == 200, f"Selfie upload failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Selfie upload failed: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_07_upload_invalid_document_type

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400 for invalid type, got: 401 assert 401 == 400 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_kyc_verification.py:172: in test_07_upload_invalid_document_type assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400 for invalid type, got: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400 for invalid type, got: 401 E assert 401 == 400 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 403, got: 401 assert 401 == 403 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_kyc_verification.py:227: in test_10_login_blocked_for_unverified_user assert response.status_code == 403, f"Expected 403, got: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 403, got: 401 E assert 401 == 403 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_11_admin_get_pending_kyc_users

failure.message: AssertionError: Test user not in pending list: [] assert 'kyc-test-1771767094@test.de' in []

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_kyc_verification.py:249: in test_11_admin_get_pending_kyc_users assert TEST_USER_EMAIL in pending_emails, f"Test user not in pending list: {pending_emails}" E AssertionError: Test user not in pending list: [] E assert 'kyc-test-1771767094@test.de' in []

testcase.name: test_14_admin_reject_kyc
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_kyc_verification.py:299: in test_14_admin_reject_kyc assert response.status_code == 200, f"KYC rejection failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: KYC rejection failed: {"detail":[{"type":"string_type","loc":["body","user_id"],"msg":"Input should be a valid string","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/string_type"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_kyc_verification.py:312: in test_15_get_kyc_status_after_rejection assert response.status_code == 200, f"KYC status check failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: KYC status check failed: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
